data.body: Done definition update: (1) Resolve perf SLO inconsistency: the enforceable DoD is sub-10ms for a single lookup (the 'sub-millisecond' phrasing in the title and epic approach is aspirational language; the testable SLO is sub-10ms). (2) Archived-ticket semantics: 'ticket exists <id>' MUST return exit 0 for archived tickets (directory + CREATE event present) — matching the archive-agnostic semantics of pre-commit-ticket-gate.sh today. Unlike 'ticket list' which excludes archived by default, 'exists' is a raw presence check used for validating committed ticket IDs regardless of archival status. Document this distinction in the subcommand help text. [adversarial-review, blue-team accepted]
